primary_objectives: Securing resilient and accessible housing for all biological beings via the Open Organisation's fundamentals.
Ensuring the sovereign and open transmission of education and knowledge for all biological beings.
Maintaining a 100% sovereign, redundant, and collective infrastructure (Aura).
Strategic and professional outreach to SMBs and Enterprises globally.
Full digitalisation and automation for local communities and organisations.
Maximising collective resource growth for reinvestment in vital services.
Building a custom Zig-based network stack (Aura Edge) for decentralized, secure connectivity.
Freedom of time for all: minimising reactive work through advanced autonomous coordination.
